chat_history.content: Find me 10 differentiated Please find companies offering compliance technology and compliance services to RIAs and wealth management firms. companies in NCP Priority Geography (Eastern US).

Got it. I know what NCP looks for — founder-owned, differentiated, right to win, growing market, no PE on the cap table. I'll search multiple channels and only bring you companies I'm genuinely excited about (conviction 6+/10). You'll get 10 with investment memos. Give me feedback on each one and I'll learn your preferences.

row.Description: Prudent Technologies and Consulting, Inc. is a technology consulting firm specializing in IT consulting, data sciences, and digital transformation services. The company supports enterprises globally with AI-driven solutions, cybersecurity, and enterprise platform services, operating through onshore and offshore delivery models.
